snippet.title: TPG RE Finance Trust Focusing on Recycling Capital into New Opportunities

snippet.title: TPG RE Finance Trust Focusing on Recycling Capital into New Opportunities
snippet.description:
Doug Bouquard, CEO of TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: TRTX), participated in a video interview at Nareit’s REITweek: 2023 Investor Conference, held in New York June 6-8.

Bouquard discussed steps TPG has taken in response to the pressure on real estate credit and equity markets, how active TRTX has been in terms of originating new loans, as well as some of the top priorities for the rest of 2023 and into 2024.

Read more: https://www.reit.com/news/video/tpg-re-finance-trust-focusing-recycling-capital-new-opportunities
